divergences.decision: MM compatibility and wire-contract model: the Socratic corpus records protobuf service/message contracts as the client/worker wire contracts (`_mm/socratic/QUESTION_TREE-yuanrong-datasystem.adoc` Q3.5.6, `_mm/socratic/docs/specs/use-cases-yuanrong-datasystem.adoc` section 3.5) and records compatibility as a quality property with wire compatibility tied to protobuf/gRPC (`_mm/socratic/QUESTION_TREE-yuanrong-datasystem.adoc` Q4.3).
divergences.detail: The PR changes `RegisterClientRspPb` field 24 from `int32 log_rate_limit` to `LogSampleConfigPb log_sample_config`. That is an incompatible protobuf wire-contract evolution on the SDK-worker registration response. The PR also removes the old client-side consumption path and only applies `log_sample_config` when present, so there is no versioned or additive compatibility path in the diff. This diverges from the stored MM's compatibility/wire-contract model unless maintainers update the MM to bless this breaking protocol change.
divergences.fix: Evolve the proto additively: reserve or keep field 24 for the old `log_rate_limit`, add `LogSampleConfigPb` on a new field number, and bridge old/new clients during rollout; alternatively update the Socratic MM/ADR corpus to explicitly accept a breaking SDK-worker wire-contract change for this release.

examined: _mm/vibed-codeset/CLAUDE.md via get_context.py overview fallback for src/datasystem/common/log/log_sampler.cpp
_mm/vibed-codeset/CLAUDE.md via get_context.py overview fallback for src/datasystem/protos/share_memory.proto
